content.question: Do association-school and multi-service hub frameworks in Poland reduce rural school closures, maintain educational quality, and preserve social capital simultaneously, or are there trade-offs (e.g. lower test scores, higher teacher turnover)?
content.reduction_path: Rigorous quasi-experimental studies (diff-in-diff, RDD, or matched-pair) comparing association schools vs. traditional public schools or closed schools on student outcomes, teacher retention, and local institutional vitality over 10+ years.
